study_title: RNA-seq of imaginal discs during metamorphosis to wings and thoracic dorsum in the honeybee castes
exp_title: RNA-seq of honey bee workers: wings and thoracic dorsum
design: RNA extractions were made using TRIzol reagent (Invitrogen) following manufacturer instructions. Purity and concentration of RNA extracted from each sample was determined through optical absorbance at 260/280 nm using NanoDrop ND-1000 (NanoDrop Technologies). The RNA samples (2 g/per sample) were used for libraries preparation using TruSeq RNA sample preparation (Illumina) and a system of adaptors (barcodes). RNA samples were sequenced in an Illumina HiSeq 2500 equipment.
